basic_details.job_title: Allahabad Museum Finance-cum-Accounts Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Allahabad Museum has released the official Finance-cum-Accounts Officer Notification 2026. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the Allahabad Museum Finance-cum-Accounts Officer Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates up to 56 years of age who are serving on an analogous post in an organized accounts service or possess equivalent experience in accounts and audit, as per the prescribed eligibility criteria, can apply offline till 23 July 2026. The official notification PDF and application form details are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: Officer on analogous post in organized account service or equivalent experience in accounts/audit as per detailed eligibility criteria
qualification.details: Officer on analogous post in organized account service; Or Section officer of CSS in the pay scale of Pay Band-2: Rs. 9300-34800+Grade Pay of Rs.4800 with 2 years regular service in the grade and experience in finance and accounts; Or Candidates from accounts office/audit office in the pay scale of Pay Band-2: Rs. 9300-34800+Grade Pay of Rs. 4600 having three years regular service; Or Assistant Accounts officer/Assistant Audit officer in the pay scale of Pay Band-2: Rs. 9300-34800 +Grade Pay of Rs.4200 with 8 years regular service

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Band Rs. 9300-34,800 + Grade Pay Rs. 5400 (Level-9), Group 'B'
salary_details.details: Pay Band Rs. 9300-34,800 + Grade Pay Rs. 5400 (Level-9), Group 'B'

selection_process: Deputation based on eligibility criteria and service records
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.theallahabadmuseum.com.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 23-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.theallahabadmuseum.com. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 23-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Allahabad Museum Finance-cum-Accounts Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Finance-cum-Accounts Officer post is 23rd July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Finance-cum-Accounts Officer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Finance-cum-Accounts Officer position at the Allahabad Museum.

faq.question: Q3. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Finance-cum-Accounts Officer post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Finance-cum-Accounts Officer post is 56 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Finance-cum-Accounts Officer position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Pay Band Rs. 9300-34,800 + Grade Pay Rs. 5400 (Level-9), Group 'B'.

faq.question: Q6. What are the eligibility criteria for the Finance-cum-Accounts Officer role?
faq.answer: Eligibility includes being an officer on an analogous post in an organized account service or having equivalent experience in accounts/audit, with specific qualifications mentioned in the detailed criteria.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Allahabad Museum Finance-cum-Accounts Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection will be based on deputation, considering the eligibility criteria and service records of the candidates.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Allahabad Museum, the link for which is provided in the Important Links section.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of the Allahabad Museum?
faq.answer: The official website of the Allahabad Museum is www.theallahabadmuseum.com.
